_doc: TAUNT VERIFY LOOP worklist. Each cron fire takes the FIRST boss with verify_status=='pending', re-reads its source_tags' chat_*.png frames with vision, confirms/corrects each taunt text in the .cs file, stamps a provenance comment (// VERIFIED <tag> | // CORRECTED <tag> | // UNVERIFIABLE-source-lost | // DESIGNED-no-footage), recompiles (0 errors), sets verify_status, then STOPS. Base-game files are excluded.
